ModMetaData.name: Multiplayer Compatibility (roycho96 fork)
ModMetaData.author: RimWorld Multiplayer Team (forked by roycho96)
ModMetaData.description:
[FORK] Private fork of rwmt/Multiplayer-Compatibility with extra desync fixes for hanne's MP group. Original: https://github.com/rwmt/Multiplayer-Compatibility (MIT License, see LICENSE) This fork: https://github.com/roycho96/Multiplayer-Compatibility
Added on top of upstream: - DBH RegisterAll + Designator_RemoveSewage sync worker (Dubs Bad Hygiene) - VEF RNG isolation (PickUpAndHaul + PawnGenerator flows) - KiiroRace compat: sync Apparel_PoisonBottle and Apparel_Stealth toggle lambdas - Vanilla determinism patches (trace context + finalizers)
⚠ Same packageId as upstream — do NOT subscribe to both. Unsubscribe from the original workshop Multiplayer Compatibility before enabling this fork.
Original description follows:
Miscellaneous patches to make Multiplayer work Mod Support: - [KV] RimFridge - [KV] Path Avoid - [O21] Clutter Structures - Alpha Animals - Alpha Biomes - Animals Logic - Avoid Friendly Fire - Choice of Psycasts - Cleaning Area - Common Sense - Corruption Core - Corruption Psykers - Corruption - Worship - Cut Plants Before Building - Desynchronized: Tales and News (Continued) - Dragon's Descent - Fertile Fields - Gastronomy - Genetic Rim - Immortals - LWM's Deep Storage - MinifyEverything - Misc. Robots - Misc. Training - Netrve's DeepStorage GUI - Pocket Sand - PowerSwitch - Prison Labor - QualityBuilder - Reunion - RunAndGun - RPG Style Inventory Revamped - Sandy's RPG Style Inventory - Simple Sidearms - Simply More Bridges (Continued) - Smarter Construction - Sparkling Worlds - Full Mod - Sparkling Worlds - Modular Core - Reduced features - SRTS Expanded - Stuffed Floors - Time-of-Day Switches - Vanilla Achievements Expanded - Vanilla Animals Expanded — Endangered - Vanilla Brewing Expanded - Vanilla Cooking Expanded - Vanilla Events Expanded - Vanilla Expanded Framework - Vanilla Factions Expanded - Insectoids - Vanilla Factions Expanded - Mechanoids - Vanilla Factions Expanded - Medieval - Vanilla Factions Expanded - Settlers - Vanilla Factions Expanded - Vikings - Vanilla Fishing Expanded - Vanilla Furniture Expanded - Farming - Vanilla Furniture Expanded - Power - Vanilla Furniture Expanded - Security - Vanilla Hair Expanded - Vanilla Plants Expanded - Auto Plow Patch - Vanilla Social Interactions Expanded - Vanilla Traits Expanded (Partial Support) - Vanilla Weapons Expanded - Laser - What the hack?!
